title: daphne albowiana
intro: Daphne albowiana, also known as the Chinese Daphne or Chinese Gold Daphne, is a type of flowering plant in the Daphne genus that belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Daphne albowiana include its ability to soothe coughs, relieve bronchitis, and calm respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a powder in traditional remedies.
